Cassidy Williams' Visit and Vibe Coding

03-22-2026

This past week, Dalia Abo Sheasha, a project manager for Visual Studio (not Visual Studio Code) at Microsoft visit our class. Her visit opened my eyes to the reality of how common AI use really is. Throughout this class and my own personal experiences, I've been given the impression that most people in the software development industry take advantage of AI in an organized way. Personally, that's what I do. Before Dalia visited, she had us read a Stack Overflow article


A Poem on Vibe Coding
